title: AI Journey Portfolio
description: Full-stack portfolio site with blog, project showcase, timeline, and admin CMS. Features dark theme, markdown rendering with syntax highlighting, and dynamic content from Turso DB.

title: Pantry & Receipt App
description: Scan grocery receipts with AI-powered OCR, automatically track pantry items with shelf life predictions, and get expiry alerts. Uses Google Cloud Vision + Claude Haiku for intelligent parsing.

title: SSH Portfolio (this!)
description: The terminal-based portfolio you're browsing right now. Built with Go and the Charmbracelet TUI ecosystem, served over SSH.

title: Trip Planner
description: Lightweight travel planning tool with itinerary builder. Pure HTML/CSS/JS with no framework — proving that sometimes the simplest approach wins.

title: Interactive Travel Map
description: Interactive world map marking places I've visited, with photo galleries pulled from Instagram. Built with Leaflet.js and Zustand for state management.
